# comfyui_system_stats (Data Source)

Retrieves system statistics from the ComfyUI server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "comfyui_system_stats" "example" {}

output "gpu_name" {
  value = data.comfyui_system_stats.example.devices
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `comfyui_version` (String) ComfyUI version.
- `devices` (Attributes List) List of compute devices available on the server. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--devices))
- `embedded_python` (Boolean) Whether the server uses an embedded Python installation.
- `os` (String) Operating system of the ComfyUI server.
- `python_version` (String) Python version running on the server.

<a id="nestedatt--devices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `devices`

Read-Only:

- `index` (Number) Device index.
- `name` (String) Device name.
- `torch_vram_free` (Number) Free Torch VRAM in bytes.
- `torch_vram_total` (Number) Total Torch VRAM in bytes.
- `type` (String) Device type (e.g., cuda, cpu).
- `vram_free` (Number) Free VRAM in bytes.
- `vram_total` (Number) Total VRAM in bytes.
